```{r}
  nrow(neurolinguistical_diagnostics) == 4L,
  !anyDuplicated(neurolinguistical_diagnostics$text_id),
  setequal(
    neurolinguistical_diagnostics$text_id,
    target_text_order
  ),
  all(neurolinguistical_diagnostics$n_word_tokens > 0L),
  all(neurolinguistical_diagnostics$n_word_types > 0L),
  all(neurolinguistical_diagnostics$n_hapax >= 0L),
  all(
    neurolinguistical_diagnostics$n_hapax <=
      neurolinguistical_diagnostics$n_word_types
  ),
  all(neurolinguistical_diagnostics$token_length_letters_mean > 0),
  all(dplyr::between(neurolinguistical_diagnostics$ttr, 0, 1)),
  all(
    dplyr::between(
      neurolinguistical_diagnostics$content_density,
      0,
      1
    )
  ),
  all(
    dplyr::between(
      neurolinguistical_diagnostics$verb_rate,
      0,
      1
    )
  ),
  all(
    dplyr::between(
      neurolinguistical_diagnostics$adj_rate,
      0,
      1
    )
  ),
  all(is.finite(neurolinguistical_diagnostics$brunet_index))
)

neurolinguistical_diagnostics_path <- paste0(
  "../measure_outputs/",
  "modul_7_to_modul_8_neurolinguistical_diagnostics.rds"
)

saveRDS(
  neurolinguistical_diagnostics,
  neurolinguistical_diagnostics_path,
  version = 3
)

neurolinguistical_diagnostics <- readRDS(
  neurolinguistical_diagnostics_path
)

neurolinguistical_diagnostics_presentation <-
  neurolinguistical_diagnostics |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(
      c(
        n_word_tokens,
        n_word_types,
        n_hapax,
        n_content_words,
        n_verbs,
        n_adjectives
      ),
      as.integer
    ),
    dplyr::across(
      c(
        token_length_letters_mean,
        token_length_letters_sd,
        token_length_letters_median,
        ttr,
        brunet_index,
        honore_statistic,
        content_density,
        verb_rate,
        adj_rate
      ),
      ~ ifelse(
        is.na(.x),
        NA_character_,
        sprintf("%.3f", .x)
      )
    )
  )

print(
  neurolinguistical_diagnostics_presentation,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)

cat(
  "\nNeurolinguistical diagnostics completed and frozen.\n",
  "Target texts represented: ",
  nrow(neurolinguistical_diagnostics),
  "\n",
  "Human included: yes\n",
  "ChatGPT included: yes\n",
  "Gemini included: yes\n",
  "Claude included: yes\n",
  "Token length counted in letters: yes\n",
  "Frozen output: ",
  neurolinguistical_diagnostics_path,
  "\n",
  sep = ""
)
```

# # MODUL 7 FINAL — Verify the MODUL 7 to MODUL 8 handover

```{r}
# MODUL 7 FINAL — Verify the MODUL 7 to MODUL 8 handover

modul_7_to_modul_8_paths <- c(
  x2_indices_bundles =
    "../measure_outputs/modul_7_x2_distributional_plausibility_bundle.rds",
  sentence_length_diagnostics =
    "../measure_outputs/module_independent_sentence_length_diagnostics.rds",
  neurolinguistical_diagnostics =
    "../measure_outputs/modul_7_to_modul_8_neurolinguistical_diagnostics.rds"
)

stopifnot(all(file.exists(modul_7_to_modul_8_paths)))

modul_7_x2_indices_bundles <- readRDS(
  modul_7_to_modul_8_paths[["x2_indices_bundles"]]
)

modul_7_sentence_length_diagnostics <- readRDS(
  modul_7_to_modul_8_paths[["sentence_length_diagnostics"]]
)

modul_7_neurolinguistical_diagnostics <- readRDS(
  modul_7_to_modul_8_paths[["neurolinguistical_diagnostics"]]
)

required_x2_objects <- c(
  "x2a_functor_candidates",
  "x2b_sliding_windows",
  "x2c_connector_sw",
  "query_occurrences",
  "query_inventory",
  "query_results",
  "enriched_occurrences",
  "x2a_occurrences",
  "x2b_occurrences",
  "x2c_occurrences",
  "mwCombo_by_text",
  "text_level_diagnostics",
  "measure_status",
  "final_audit"
)

required_neurolinguistical_fields <- c(
  "text_id",
  "text_label",
  "n_word_tokens",
  "n_word_types",
  "n_hapax",
  "token_length_letters_mean",
  "token_length_letters_sd",
  "token_length_letters_median",
  "ttr",
  "brunet_index",
  "honore_statistic",
  "n_content_words",
  "content_density",
  "n_verbs",
  "verb_rate",
  "n_adjectives",
  "adj_rate"
)

target_text_order <- c(
  "HUMAN_BASELINE_001",
  "BASIC_CHATGPT_NATIVE_001",
  "BASIC_GEMINI_NATIVE_001",
  "BASIC_CLAUDE_NATIVE_001"
)

stopifnot(
  is.list(modul_7_x2_indices_bundles),
  all(required_x2_objects %in% names(modul_7_x2_indices_bundles)),

  is.data.frame(modul_7_sentence_length_diagnostics),
  nrow(modul_7_sentence_length_diagnostics) == 4L,
  !anyDuplicated(modul_7_sentence_length_diagnostics$text_id),
  setequal(
    modul_7_sentence_length_diagnostics$text_id,
    target_text_order
  ),

  is.data.frame(modul_7_neurolinguistical_diagnostics),
  all(
    required_neurolinguistical_fields %in%
      names(modul_7_neurolinguistical_diagnostics)
  ),
  nrow(modul_7_neurolinguistical_diagnostics) == 4L,
  !anyDuplicated(modul_7_neurolinguistical_diagnostics$text_id),
  setequal(
    modul_7_neurolinguistical_diagnostics$text_id,
    target_text_order
  )
)

modul_7_to_modul_8_handover_manifest <- list(
  x2_indices_bundles_path = unname(
    modul_7_to_modul_8_paths[["x2_indices_bundles"]]
  ),
  sentence_length_diagnostics_path = unname(
    modul_7_to_modul_8_paths[["sentence_length_diagnostics"]]
  ),
  neurolinguistical_diagnostics_path = unname(
    modul_7_to_modul_8_paths[["neurolinguistical_diagnostics"]]
  ),
  sentence_length_diagnostics_texts =
    modul_7_sentence_length_diagnostics$text_id,
  neurolinguistical_diagnostics_texts =
    modul_7_neurolinguistical_diagnostics$text_id,
  gemini_x2_status = "not_calculated",
  gemini_x2_exclusion_reason =
    "excluded_modul_7_parser_reliability",
  handover_passed = TRUE
)

modul_7_to_modul_8_handover_manifest_path <- paste0(
  "../measure_outputs/",
  "modul_7_to_modul_8_handover_manifest.rds"
)

saveRDS(
  modul_7_to_modul_8_handover_manifest,
  modul_7_to_modul_8_handover_manifest_path,
  version = 3
)

cat(
  "\nMODUL 7 to MODUL 8 handover verified and frozen.\n",
  "MODUL 7 x2 indices bundles: ",
  modul_7_to_modul_8_paths[["x2_indices_bundles"]],
  "\n",
  "Sentence-length diagnostics: ",
  modul_7_to_modul_8_paths[["sentence_length_diagnostics"]],
  "\n",
  "Neurolinguistical diagnostics: ",
  modul_7_to_modul_8_paths[["neurolinguistical_diagnostics"]],
  "\n",
  "Handover manifest: ",
  modul_7_to_modul_8_handover_manifest_path,
  "\n",
  "Gemini in sentence-length diagnostics: yes\n",
  "Gemini in neurolinguistical diagnostics: yes\n",
  "Gemini in MODUL 7 x2 indices bundles: no\n",
  sep = ""
)
```

# Temporary inspection cell

```{r}
current_texts_parsed <- readRDS(
  "../data_prep_CCP_output/current_texts_parsed.rds"
)

names(current_texts_parsed)
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
